allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://text.pollinations.ai/openai/chat/completions" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""""model"""":""""openai"""",""""messages"""":[{""""role"""":""""user"""",""""content"""":""""Say hi in 5 words""""}],""""stream"""":false}' --max-time 15)
